vocab.meaning: đánh dấu một thành tựu học tập
vocab.example: My parents presented me with a sophisticated timepiece to mark a scholastic achievement after my university graduation.

vocab.meaning: một món quà bất ngờ và xa xỉ
vocab.example: Receiving a luxury watch from my uncle felt like an extravagant windfall that I never anticipated.

vocab.meaning: sức quyến rũ không phai mờ
vocab.example: The vintage watch I was gifted has an unfading allure that makes it stand out from modern digital gadgets.

vocab.meaning: thành quả cuối cùng của sự nỗ lực
vocab.example: To me, that watch represents the culmination of hard work throughout my high school years.

vocab.meaning: một sự tri ân/ghi nhận xứng đáng
vocab.example: The watch was given to me as a fitting tribute to my years of service at the company.

vocab.meaning: giá trị về cả vật chất lẫn tinh thần
vocab.example: It is an object of immense monetary and emotional worth, given its history within our family.

vocab.meaning: một vật luôn hiện hữu/gắn bó bên mình
vocab.example: Since receiving it as a birthday gift, that watch has become a constant fixture on my left wrist.

vocab.meaning: vẻ ngoài chuyên nghiệp kín đáo/tinh tế
vocab.example: The gift was perfect because it projects an understated professional aura during my job interviews.

vocab.meaning: củng cố một mối quan hệ
vocab.example: Exchanging such meaningful gifts like watches can really help solidify a relationship between lifelong friends.

vocab.meaning: thương hiệu lâu đời và đáng kính
vocab.example: I was lucky enough to be gifted a piece from a venerable brand known for its precision and history.
